---
title: "Medulloblastoma models analysis"
author: "Érica Garcia Verellen, Arnau Montagud"
date: "2026 06 15"
output: html_document
---

Note: All the scripts and data can be downloaded from https://github.com/gprolcastelo/synthetic_medulloblastoma

# Set up

## Packages

First import the required packages.

```{r setup}

# Packages
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")
list.of.packages <- c("ggplot2", "tidyverse", "magrittr", "factoextra", "FactoMineR", "RColorBrewer", "patchwork", "ggsignif", "ggrepel","circlize","grid")
pacman::p_load(list.of.packages, character.only = TRUE)

install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("ComplexHeatmap")
library(ComplexHeatmap)

```

# Import and prepare data

## Microarray data and metadata

Please note that the data imported below have already been pre-processed according to the methods described in the paper.

```{r data load, eval=TRUE, include=FALSE}

data <- read.delim("./all_RNA_final.txt", sep="\t") 
clinical_data <- read.delim("./augmented_metadata.csv", sep=",")
colnames(clinical_data) <- c("Patient","Grouping")

data1 <- full_join(data, clinical_data, by = c("Patient_ID"="Patient")) %>% mutate(Grouping2 = str_replace(
  str_replace(
    str_replace(Grouping, "Group_","G")
    , "G3_G4","G3G4")
  , "synthetic_","s_"))

data1_2 <- data1 %>% 
  filter(!Grouping2 %in% c("SHH", "WNT")) %>% 
  select(!c(ROCK2, DEPTOR, CDK1, YES1, BCL2L1)) # removing most diff between synthetic and real

data1_2_old <- data1 %>% 
  filter(!Grouping2 %in% c("SHH", "WNT"))

clinical_data <- clinical_data %>%
  filter(!Grouping %in% c("SHH", "WNT")) 

data2 <- data1_2 %>% column_to_rownames(var = "Patient_ID") %>% dplyr::select(-Grouping, -Grouping2)

write_csv(data1_2, "all_sims.csv")

```


```{r color}

color_palette = c("G3" = "#FFBF00", "s_G3" = "#AF7D00", "G4" = "#00CA8A", "s_G4" = "#058469", "G3-G4" = "#FF367B", "s_G3-G4" = "#9C0153")

```

# pathway analysis
```{r pathway analysis}

## load data
df <- data1_2
 
cols <- colnames(df)
sample_id_col <- cols[1]
label_cols <- cols[cols %in% c("Grouping", "Grouping2")]
feature_cols <- setdiff(cols, c(sample_id_col, label_cols))

# Choose Grouping2 as primary label (case-insensitive fallback)
if ("Grouping2" %in% names(df)) {
  group_col <- "Grouping2"
} else {
  idx <- which(tolower(names(df)) == "grouping2")
  if (length(idx) != 1) stop("Could not find Grouping2 column")
  group_col <- names(df)[idx]
}

cat("Sample ID column:", sample_id_col, "\n")
cat("Label columns:", paste(label_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Grouping2 counts:\n")
print(table(df[[group_col]]))

# Global range check
global_min <- min(df[, feature_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
global_max <- max(df[, feature_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
cat("Global feature range:", global_min, "to", global_max, "\n")

## pathway definitions
all_features <- feature_cols

pathways <- list(
  Apoptosis = c("Apoptosis", "BAD", "BCL2","BCL2L1", "FOXO"),
  Proliferation_CellCycle = c("Proliferation", "MYC", "CDC25B", "JUN", 
                              "NR4A3", "ATF2", "CDK1", "CREB1","SIRT1"),
  PI3K_AKT_mTOR = c("PI3K", "AKT1", "AKT2", "AKT3", "PDPK1", "PTEN", 
                    "TSC", "mTORC1", "mTORC2", "EIF4E", "EIF4EBP1", 
                    "FOXO", "Protein_synthesis", "DEPTOR",
                    "PLCG1", "SNAI1", "PRKACA", "PRKCA", "PRKCB", 
                    "PRKCG", "PRKCZ", "FUS", "RHEB"),
  RAS_MAPK = c("GRB2", "SOS1", "SHC1", "HRAS", "KRAS", "NRAS", 
               "ARAF", "RAF1", "BRAF", "MAP2K1", "MAP2K2", 
               "MAPK1", "MAPK3", "RPS6KA1", "PTK2B", "PTPN11"),
  RTK_Signalling = c("EGFR", "ERBB2", "ERBB3", "ERBB4", "EPHA2"),
  Hippo_YAP = c("LATS1", "LATS2", "AMOTL2", "WWTR1", "YAP1", "WWP1", "YES1"),
  Cytoskeleton_Actin = c("Actin_cytoskeleton_reorganization", "F_actin_dynamics",
                         "Microtubule_polimerization", "Tubulin",
                         "LIMK1", "LIMK2", "PAK1", "PAK2", "PAK3", "PAK4", 
                         "CDC42", "CDC42BPA", "RAC1", "RHOA", "ROCK1", 
                         "CFL1", "CFL2", "STMN1", "TTL", "ITCH", "PPP1R12A",
                         "PPP1R12B", "CTTN", "ROCK2", "MP", 
                         "CTNNB1"), 
  Invasion_Motility = c("Cell_migration", "Neuron_migration", "Metastasis",
                        "GNA13", "GIT1", "ARHGEF1", "ARHGEF11", "ARHGEF12", 
                       "ARHGEF6", "SPART", "SRC", "SYN1",
                       "NFE2L2")
)

pathways_ori <- pathways

# Verify all nodes exist in matrix
for (pw in names(pathways_ori)) {
  available <- intersect(pathways_ori[[pw]], colnames(df))
  cat(sprintf("%s: %d/%d nodes present\n", pw, length(available), length(pathways_ori[[pw]])))
  pathways_ori[[pw]] <- available
}
pathways <- lapply(pathways_ori, function(nodes) intersect(nodes, all_features))
pathways <- pathways[sapply(pathways, length) > 0]

## compute pathway scores per sample
pathway_scores <- lapply(names(pathways), function(pw) {
  nodes <- pathways[[pw]]
  rowMeans(df[, nodes, drop = FALSE], na.rm = TRUE)
})
names(pathway_scores) <- names(pathways)

pathway_df <- as.data.frame(pathway_scores, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
pathway_df[[group_col]] <- df[[group_col]]

## per-group summary stats
long_scores <- pathway_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(names(pathways)),
               names_to = "Pathway",
               values_to = "Mean_group") %>%
  mutate(Group = .data[[group_col]])

stats_df <- long_scores %>%
  group_by(Pathway, Group) %>%
  summarise(
    N = n(),
    Mean = mean(Mean_group),
    SD = ifelse(n() > 1, sd(Mean_group), NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

## Kruskal–Wallis (ANOVA-like) per pathway
kw_df <- long_scores %>%
  group_by(Pathway) %>%
  group_map(~ {
    fit <- tryCatch(
      kruskal.test(Mean_group ~ Group, data = .x),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(fit)) {
      tibble(Kruskal_H = NA_real_, Kruskal_p = NA_real_)
    } else {
      tibble(Kruskal_H = as.numeric(fit$statistic),
             Kruskal_p = fit$p.value)
    }
  }) %>%
  bind_rows() %>%
  mutate(Pathway = names(pathways)) %>%
  mutate(Significance = dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(Kruskal_p)  ~ "",
    Kruskal_p < 0.001 ~ "***",
    Kruskal_p < 0.01  ~ "**",
    Kruskal_p < 0.05  ~ "*",
    TRUE              ~ "ns"
  )) %>%
  select(Pathway, Kruskal_H, Kruskal_p, Significance) %>%
  arrange(Kruskal_p)

## pairwise effect sizes and Mann–Whitney (Student's t) p-values
unique_groups <- sort(unique(pathway_df[[group_col]]))

pairwise_list <- list()

for (pw in names(pathways)) {
  for (i in seq_along(unique_groups)) {
    for (j in (i + 1):length(unique_groups)) {
      if (j > length(unique_groups) || i == j) next
      g1 <- unique_groups[i]
      g2 <- unique_groups[j]
      v1 <- pathway_df[pathway_df[[group_col]] == g1, pw]
      v2 <- pathway_df[pathway_df[[group_col]] == g2, pw]

      m1 <- mean(v1); m2 <- mean(v2)
      s1 <- sd(v1);   s2 <- sd(v2)
      n1 <- length(v1); n2 <- length(v2)

      if (n1 > 1 && n2 > 1) {
        sp <- sqrt(((n1 - 1) * s1^2 + (n2 - 1) * s2^2) / (n1 + n2 - 2))
        d <- if (sp > 0) (m1 - m2) / sp else NA_real_
      } else {
        d <- NA_real_
      }

      p_mw <- tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(v1, v2, exact = FALSE)$p.value,
        error = function(e) NA_real_
      )

      pairwise_list[[length(pairwise_list) + 1]] <- data.frame(
        Pathway = pw,
        Group1 = g1,
        Group2 = g2,
        MeanDiff = m1 - m2,
        Cohens_d = d,
        MW_p = p_mw,
        MW_Significance = dplyr::case_when(
          is.na(p_mw)  ~ "",
          p_mw < 0.001 ~ "***",
          p_mw < 0.01  ~ "**",
          p_mw < 0.05  ~ "*",
          TRUE         ~ "ns"
        ),
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
  }
}

pairwise_df <- bind_rows(pairwise_list)

## mean matrix (pathway x group) 
mean_table <- stats_df %>%
  select(Pathway, Group, Mean) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Group, values_from = Mean)

```

```{r figure pathways}

library(ComplexHeatmap)

group_levels <- c("G3", "s_G3", "G3-G4", "s_G3-G4", "G4", "s_G4")
group_levels <- group_levels[group_levels %in% unique(pathway_df[[group_col]])]

pathway_df[[group_col]] <- factor(pathway_df[[group_col]], levels = group_levels)
group_colours <- color_palette[group_levels]

mean_by_group <- pathway_df %>%
  group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
  summarise(across(all_of(names(pathways)), mean), .groups = "drop")

heatmap_mat <- as.data.frame(mean_by_group)
rownames(heatmap_mat) <- heatmap_mat[[group_col]]
heatmap_mat[[group_col]] <- NULL
heatmap_mat <- t(as.matrix(heatmap_mat))

# optional z-score by pathway for relative interpretation
heatmap_mat_z <- t(scale(t(heatmap_mat)))

# column annotation
ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = colnames(heatmap_mat_z),
  col = list(Group = group_colours),
  annotation_name_side = "left",
  show_annotation_name = T,
  show_legend = FALSE
)

# colour function for z-scored pathway means
col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(-2, 0, 2),
  c("#2166ac", "white", "#b2182b")
)

ht <- Heatmap(
  heatmap_mat_z,
  name = "Z-score",
  col = col_fun,
  top_annotation = ha,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = T,
  row_names_side = "left",
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  column_names_side = "top",
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  column_names_rot = 45,
  heatmap_legend_param = list(
    title = "Relative\nactivation",
    at = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2)
  ),
  rect_gp = gpar(col = "white", lwd = 1),
  border = TRUE
)

draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right")

```

## Pairwise analysis
```{r pairwise}

pair <- pairwise_df %>%
  mutate(Comparison = paste(Group1, "vs", Group2))

path_order <- pair %>% distinct(Pathway) %>% pull(Pathway)
comp_order <- pair %>% distinct(Comparison) %>% pull(Comparison)

mat_d <- pair %>%
  select(Pathway, Comparison, Cohens_d) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparison, values_from = Cohens_d) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(mat_d) <- mat_d$Pathway
mat_d$Pathway <- NULL
mat_d <- as.matrix(mat_d[path_order, comp_order])

mat_sig <- pair %>%
  select(Pathway, Comparison, MW_Significance) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Comparison, values_from = MW_Significance) %>%
  as.data.frame()

rownames(mat_sig) <- mat_sig$Pathway
mat_sig$Pathway <- NULL
mat_sig <- as.matrix(mat_sig[path_order, comp_order])

col_fun <- colorRamp2(
  c(min(mat_d, na.rm = TRUE), 0, max(mat_d, na.rm = TRUE)),
  c("#2b83ba", "white", "#d7191c")
)

col_order <- c(
  # Same-type comparisons
  "G3 vs s_G3",
  "G3-G4 vs s_G3-G4",
  "G4 vs s_G4",
  # G3 vs the rest
  "G3 vs G3-G4",
  "G3 vs s_G3-G4",
  "G3 vs G4",
  "G3 vs s_G4",
  # G3-G4 vs the rest
  "G3-G4 vs G4",
  "G3-G4 vs s_G3",
  "G3-G4 vs s_G4",
  # G4 vs the rest
  "G4 vs s_G3",
  "G4 vs s_G3-G4",
  # s_ vs s_
  "s_G3 vs s_G3-G4",
  "s_G3 vs s_G4",
  "s_G3-G4 vs s_G4"
)

ht_pw<-Heatmap(
  mat_d,
  name = "Cohen's d",
  col = col_fun,
  cluster_rows = TRUE,
  cluster_columns = FALSE,
  column_order = col_order,          # <-- added
  column_names_rot = 45,
  row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10),
  column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8),
  cell_fun = function(j, i, x, y, w, h, fill) {
    s <- mat_sig[i, j]
    if (!is.na(s) && s != "ns") {
      grid.text(s, x, y, gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"))
    }
  }
)

ht_pw

```


```{r saving files heatmap}

write.csv(stats_df, file = "./pathway_group_stats_R.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(kw_df, file = "./pathway_kw_R.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(pairwise_df, file = "./pathway_pairwise_R.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(mean_table, file = "./pathway_group_means_matrix_R.csv", row.names = TRUE)

png(
  filename = "./model_heatmap_pathways.png",
  units = "in",
  width = 7,
  height = 6.5,
  res = 300)
draw(ht, heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()

png(
  filename = "./model_heatmap_pathways_pairwise.png",
  units = "in",
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  res = 300)
draw(ht_pw, heatmap_legend_side = "right", annotation_legend_side = "right")
dev.off()

```

## Pathways correlation to PC1 and spread
```{r PCA}

# PCA
res.pca <- PCA(data2, graph = F)

# extract some parts for plotting
PC1 <- res.pca$ind$coord[,1]
PC2 <- res.pca$ind$coord[,2]
PCs <- data.frame(cbind(PC1, PC2))

# Build aligned data frame using data2 rownames as Patient_ID
pathway_aligned <- pathway_df |>
  mutate(Patient_ID = rownames(data2),
         PC1        = res.pca$ind$coord[, 1])

# Build aligned data frame using data2 rownames as Patient_ID
pathway_aligned <- pathway_df |>
  mutate(Patient_ID = rownames(data2),
         PC1 = res.pca$ind$coord[, 1])

group_order <- c("G3", "s_G3", "G3-G4", "s_G3-G4", "G4", "s_G4")

pca_plot_df <- PCs |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("Patient_ID") |>
  left_join(pathway_aligned |> 
              select(Patient_ID, Grouping2), by = "Patient_ID") |>
  mutate(Grouping2 = factor(Grouping2, levels = group_order))

centroids <- pca_plot_df |>
  group_by(Grouping2) |>
  summarise(PC1 = mean(PC1), PC2 = mean(PC2), .groups = "drop")

pc1_var <- round(res.pca$eig[1,2], 2) 
pc2_var <- round(res.pca$eig[2,2], 2)
pc3_var <- round(res.pca$eig[3,2], 2)

PCA <- ggplot(pca_plot_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, colour = Grouping2)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, size = 1.5) +
  geom_point(data = centroids, aes(fill = Grouping2),
             shape = 2, 
             size = 5, stroke = 1.2) +
  geom_label(data = centroids, aes(label = Grouping2),
             fill = "white", size = 3,
             nudge_y = 0.5,
             show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = color_palette) +
  labs(x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pc1_var, 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pc2_var, 1), "%)"),
       colour = "Group") +
  guides(fill = "none") +
  theme_bw()

PCA
ggsave("PCA_centroids.png", width = 12, height = 11, dpi=300)

```

```{r corr and spread}

pathway_pca <- pca_plot_df |>
    left_join(pathway_aligned, by = c("Patient_ID", "Grouping2", "PC1"))

pathway_names <- names(pathways)

cor_table_full <- c("G3", "s_G3", "G3-G4", "s_G3-G4", "G4", "s_G4") |>
  purrr::map_dfr(~ {
    d <- pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == .x)
    cors <- sapply(pathway_names, function(pw) {
      round(cor(d[[pw]], d$PC1, method = "spearman"), 3)})
    tibble(Group = .x, n = nrow(d)) |> bind_cols(as_tibble_row(cors))
  }) |>
  mutate(Group = factor(Group, levels = group_order))

cor_table_full
write.csv(cor_table_full, file = "./PC1_correlation_pathways.csv", row.names = FALSE)

pairs <- list(
  "G3 vs s_G3" = c("G3", "s_G3"),
  "G3-G4 vs s_G3-G4" = c("G3-G4", "s_G3-G4"),
  "G4 vs s_G4" = c("G4", "s_G4")
)

pairwise2_df <- purrr::map_dfr(names(pairs), function(pair_name) {
  grps <- pairs[[pair_name]]

  pathway_aligned |>
    filter(Grouping2 %in% grps) |>
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(pathway_names), names_to = "Pathway", values_to = "Score") |>
    group_by(Pathway) |>
    group_modify(~ {
      d <- .x
      wilcox <- tryCatch(
        wilcox.test(Score ~ Grouping2, data = d, exact = FALSE),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      fk <- tryCatch(
        fligner.test(Score ~ Grouping2, data = d),
        error = function(e) NULL
      )
      tibble(
        Wilcox_W = if (is.null(wilcox)) NA_real_ else as.numeric(wilcox$statistic),
        Wilcox_p = if (is.null(wilcox)) NA_real_ else wilcox$p.value,
        FK_stat  = if (is.null(fk))     NA_real_ else as.numeric(fk$statistic),
        FK_p     = if (is.null(fk))     NA_real_ else fk$p.value
      )}) |>
    ungroup() |>
    mutate(Pair = pair_name)}) |>
  mutate(
    Wilcox_sig = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(Wilcox_p)  ~ "",
      Wilcox_p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      Wilcox_p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      Wilcox_p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE             ~ "ns"
    ),
    FK_sig = dplyr::case_when(
      is.na(FK_p)  ~ "",
      FK_p < 0.001 ~ "***",
      FK_p < 0.01  ~ "**",
      FK_p < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE         ~ "ns"
    )
  ) |>
  select(Pair, Pathway, Wilcox_W, Wilcox_p, Wilcox_sig, FK_stat, FK_p, FK_sig)

pairwise2_df |> filter(Wilcox_p < 0.05 | FK_p < 0.05)

write.csv(pairwise2_df, file = "./PC1_correlation_pathways_sig.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Finding outliers of pathways 
# IQR-based outlier check per group
# Pathways with correlation > 0.5 on either real or synthetic: Invasion_Motility, RTK_Signalling, PI3K
# Pathways with FK_p < 0.05: RAS_MAPK

# Invasion
inv_mot <- pathway_aligned |>
  filter(Grouping2 %in% c("G3-G4", "s_G3-G4")) |>
  select(Grouping2, Invasion_Motility)

inv_mot2 <- inv_mot |>
  group_by(Grouping2) |>
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    median   = median(Invasion_Motility),
    IQR      = IQR(Invasion_Motility),
    Q1       = quantile(Invasion_Motility, 0.25),
    Q3       = quantile(Invasion_Motility, 0.75),
    n_outliers = sum(Invasion_Motility < Q1 - 1.5 * IQR(Invasion_Motility) |
                     Invasion_Motility > Q3 + 1.5 * IQR(Invasion_Motility))
  ) |> mutate(Pathway = "Invasion_Motility")

inv_mot_fig <- ggplot(inv_mot, aes(x = Invasion_Motility, fill = Grouping2, colour = Grouping2)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_rug(aes(colour = Grouping2), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values   = color_palette) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
  labs(x = "Invasion_Motility score", y = "Density",
       fill = "Group", colour = "Group") +
  theme_bw()

# RTK
rtk <- pathway_aligned |>
  filter(Grouping2 %in% c("G3-G4", "s_G3-G4")) |>
  select(Grouping2, RTK_Signalling) #|> mutate(Grouping2 = factor(Grouping2, levels = inv_mot_levels))

rtk2 <- rtk |>
  group_by(Grouping2) |>
  summarise(
    n          = n(),
    median     = median(RTK_Signalling),
    IQR        = IQR(RTK_Signalling),
    Q1         = quantile(RTK_Signalling, 0.25),
    Q3         = quantile(RTK_Signalling, 0.75),
    n_outliers = sum(RTK_Signalling < Q1 - 1.5 * IQR(RTK_Signalling) |
                     RTK_Signalling > Q3 + 1.5 * IQR(RTK_Signalling))
  ) |> mutate(Pathway = "RTK_Signalling")

rtk_fig <- ggplot(rtk, aes(x = RTK_Signalling, fill = Grouping2, colour = Grouping2)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_rug(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values   = color_palette) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
  labs(x = "RTK_Signalling score", y = "Density",
       fill = "Group", colour = "Group") +
  theme_bw()

# PI3K
pi3k <- pathway_aligned |>
  filter(Grouping2 %in% c("G3-G4", "s_G3-G4")) |>
  select(Grouping2, PI3K_AKT_mTOR) #|> mutate(Grouping2 = factor(Grouping2, levels = inv_mot_levels))

pi3k2 <- pi3k |>
  group_by(Grouping2) |>
  summarise(
    n          = n(),
    median     = median(PI3K_AKT_mTOR),
    IQR        = IQR(PI3K_AKT_mTOR),
    Q1         = quantile(PI3K_AKT_mTOR, 0.25),
    Q3         = quantile(PI3K_AKT_mTOR, 0.75),
    n_outliers = sum(PI3K_AKT_mTOR < Q1 - 1.5 * IQR(PI3K_AKT_mTOR) |
                     PI3K_AKT_mTOR > Q3 + 1.5 * IQR(PI3K_AKT_mTOR))
  ) |> mutate(Pathway = "PI3K_AKT_mTOR")

pi3k_fig <- ggplot(pi3k, aes(x = PI3K_AKT_mTOR, fill = Grouping2, colour = Grouping2)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_rug(alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values   = color_palette) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = color_palette) +
  labs(x = "PI3K_AKT_mTOR score", y = "Density",
       fill = "Group", colour = "Group") +
  theme_bw()

outliers <- rbind(inv_mot2, pi3k2, ras_mot2, rtk2) |> relocate(Pathway)

(inv_mot_fig  | pi3k_fig | rtk_fig) + plot_layout(axis_titles = "collect", guides = "collect")
ggsave("G3G4_vs_sG3G4_pathways.png", width = 10, height = 5, dpi=300)

```

```{r Distribution of key pathway scores}

g3g4 <- pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == "G3-G4")
sg3g4 <- pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == "s_G3-G4")

# Shared scale limits per pathway
inv_range <- range(c(
  (pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == "G3-G4"))$Invasion_Motility, 
  (pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == "s_G3-G4"))$Invasion_Motility))
pi3k_range <- range(c(
  (pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == "G3-G4"))$PI3K_AKT_mTOR, 
  (pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == "s_G3-G4"))$PI3K_AKT_mTOR))
rtk_range <- range(c(
  (pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == "G3-G4"))$RTK_Signalling, 
  (pathway_pca |> filter(Grouping2 == "s_G3-G4"))$RTK_Signalling))

make_biplot <- function(highlighted, pathway, title, range) {
  ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = pca_plot_df, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2),
               colour = "grey80", size = 0.8, alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_point(data = highlighted, aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, colour = .data[[pathway]]),
               size = 2) +
    scale_colour_gradient(low = "#2C7BB6", high = "#D7191C",
                          limits = range, name = pathway) +
    labs(title = title,
         x = paste0("PC1 (", round(pc1_var, 1), "%)"),
         y = paste0("PC2 (", round(pc2_var, 1), "%)")) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
}

p1 <- make_biplot(g3g4,  "Invasion_Motility", "G3-G4 — Invasion_Motility",   inv_range)
p2 <- make_biplot(g3g4,  "PI3K_AKT_mTOR",    "G3-G4 — PI3K_AKT_mTOR",      pi3k_range)
p3 <- make_biplot(sg3g4, "Invasion_Motility", "s_G3-G4 — Invasion_Motility", inv_range)
p4 <- make_biplot(sg3g4, "PI3K_AKT_mTOR",    "s_G3-G4 — PI3K_AKT_mTOR",    pi3k_range)

p2a <- make_biplot(g3g4,  "RTK_Signalling",    "G3-G4 — RTK_Signalling",      rtk_range)
p4a <- make_biplot(sg3g4, "RTK_Signalling",    "s_G3-G4 — RTK_Signalling",    rtk_range)

p1 + p2 + p2a + p3 + p4 + p4a + plot_layout(axis_titles = "collect", guides = "collect", design = "ABC\nDEF")
ggsave("PCA_G3G4_vs_sG3G4_pathways.png", width = 14, height = 7)

```
